subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! A dewdrop from the effusions of the All-Merciful's grace, which streameth from the Fountainhead of the Divine Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله رشحی از فیوضات رحمت رحمانیه که از معین قلم ربانیه جاری است
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
